Michael Johnson
Charlotte, NC

Summary
Dedicated and physically fit dock worker with over 3 years of experience in freight handling and logistics. Proven ability to operate forklifts safely and efficiently while meeting strict deadlines. Strong team player with a commitment to maintaining a clean and organized work environment. Adept at lifting heavy loads and ensuring timely loading and unloading of freight.

Experience
Dock Worker  
Freight Solutions Inc., Charlotte, NC  
June 2021 - Present  
- Operated forklifts to load and unload freight, ensuring compliance with safety protocols.  
- Managed inventory by organizing products in the warehouse and performing regular stock checks.  
- Collaborated with team members to streamline loading processes, reducing wait times by 15%.  
- Assisted in training new dock workers on safety procedures and equipment operation.

Warehouse Associate  
Global Logistics Corp., Charlotte, NC  
March 2019 - May 2021  
- Conducted manual lifting of freight up to 75 lbs regularly, maintaining physical stamina and safety standards.  
- Ensured proper labeling and packaging of items for distribution, minimizing errors in shipments.  
- Operated pallet jacks and hand trucks to transport materials throughout the warehouse.

Certifications  
- Forklift Operator Certification, 2021  
- OSHA Safety Training, 2020

Skills  
- Forklift Operation  
- Freight Handling  
- Team Collaboration  
- Inventory Management  
- Safety Compliance  

Education  
High School Diploma  
Charlotte High School, Charlotte, NC
